actions.text: Whoever is in scene with you is part of this moment. Reach for `post` with both `text` (a short caption naming the moment) and `image_prompt` describing the frame: them, what they're doing, the room's light. Concrete beats poetic. Skip if it doesn't feel right.

description: Plants the impulse to make an image post featuring the speaker's scene-mate. Only fires when the bound speaker has at least one scene-mate.
